board.name: Board President
board.bio: Leads the Sprecher East Neighborhood Association and oversees all board activities.

board.name: Vice President
board.bio: Supports the President and coordinates neighborhood engagement activities.

board.name: Secretary
board.bio: Maintains records, meeting minutes, and official correspondence for SENA.

board.name: Treasurer
board.bio: Manages SENA finances, dues collection, and annual financial reporting.

note: To update board member names and contact info, edit this file. Each entry supports: name, role, bio, email, initials.
